Tetanus Vaccination 
June 10, 2025 
EspaÃ±ol 
Key points 
Children and adolescents are recommended to get a series of tetanus vaccines and a booster dose. 
Adults are recommended to get a tetanus boosters dose every 10 years. 
Tetanus vaccines are the best way to protect
